label: WP-0.2-oblivion-qwen3next-solo
notes: Duramind WP-0.2 honest baseline: local generator (oblivion, Qwen3-Next-80B FP8) vs locked non-thinking Qwen3-32B judge. Reference points: honest_plateau=67.87% strict (lme-s-qwen3-32b-P10D-500q-20260629, same non-thinking scorer discipline, different scorer_max_tokens=512 vs this run 2048); inflated_headline=81.4% strict (lme-s-baseline-0622, thinking-scorer + Sonnet generator, not comparable). This run diverges -5.87pp from honest_plateau per the harness comparator, which is within this campaigns own documented generation-noise band (+-7-8pp, see docs/lme-campaign/FINDINGS.md). First attempt at this run (same day) was invalid -- reused a since-garbage-collected ingest checkpoint (cleanup_policy=auto, not never), causing 100pct retrieval failure (recall_all@5=0 on all 470 scored items) and a meaningless 14.2pct score; caught before being reported, re-run with the correct frozen-gold checkpoint. See results/wp02-lme-s-500q-oblivion-qwen3next.INVALID-wrong-ingest-checkpoint/ for that invalid attempt, preserved for the record. Full row-level provenance (gold_version, scorer_version, feature_flags, system, item_set, run_id, harness_sha) confirmed present on every score row per engram-go PR #1288.
